nodes.name: Local File Trigger
nodes.notes: Watches /data/vault/enrich/** for new .md files. Drop a note in enrich/concepts/, enrich/topics/, enrich/entities/, or enrich/analyses/ to trigger this workflow.

nodes.name: Resolve Destination
nodes.notes: Maps enrich/<type>/foo.md → wiki/<type>/foo.md. Fails with a clear error if the subdirectory is not recognized.

nodes.name: Copy to Wiki
nodes.notes: Copies the file to wiki/<type>/. Overwrites if it already exists — the user trusts the version they drop.

nodes.name: Run reindex
nodes.notes: Rebuilds FTS index so the new note is discoverable by enrich-links.

nodes.name: Run enrich-links
nodes.notes: Discovers related wiki notes and upserts the Related section. Never modifies existing content.

nodes.name: Delete Source File
nodes.notes: Deletes only the source file from enrich/. The directory is preserved. Only runs if all previous steps succeeded.
